question_text: Let Σ be the set of all bijections from {1, ..., 5} to {1, ..., 5}, where id denotes the identity function, i.e. id(j) = j, ∀j. Let ° denote composition on functions. For a string x = x1 x2 ... xn ∈ Σn, n ≥ 0, let π(x) = x1 ° x2 ° ... ° xn.

options.C: onsider the language L = {x ∈ Σ*⏐π(x) = id}. The minimum number of states in any DFA
